index.greetingSubtitle: Manage your digital invitations from here.

budget.title: Budget Planner
budget.empty: Set up your first budget to start tracking wedding expenses.

checklist.title: Wedding Planner
checklist.notInitialized: Wedding Planner not initialized. Click to get started.
checklist.noTasks: No tasks yet. Add your first task.

deleteModal.title: Delete Invitation?
deleteModal.willBeDeleted: will be deleted. This action can be undone by an admin.

duplicateModal.title: Duplicate this invitation?
duplicateModal.body: We will create a new copy of "{title}" as a draft. Guest data, RSVPs, messages, and statistics will not be copied.

duplicateError.limitReached: You have reached your active invitation limit. Upgrade to create a new copy.

tip1.title: Choose a Template
tip1.desc: Choose from 50+ elegant wedding invitation templates.

tip2.title: Fill in Event Details
tip2.desc: Enter names, date, venue, and photos for your event.

tip3.title: Share with Guests
tip3.desc: Publish and share the link via WhatsApp in seconds.

paket.freeDescription: You are on the free plan with limited features.
paket.checkoutErrorFallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
paket.premiumPriceCta: Everything you need for your dream invitation
paket.faq1A: No. Premium is a one-time payment for 3 months (90 days). There is no auto-renewal. You can renew manually at any time.
paket.faq2A: You can pay via GoPay, OVO, Dana, QRIS, virtual bank transfer, or credit card through Mayar — secure and encrypted.
paket.faq3A: Yes. If you're not satisfied within the first 7 days, we'll refund 100% of your payment. Contact hello@theday.id.
paket.faq4Q: If my Premium expires, will my invitation be deleted?
paket.faq4A: No. Your invitation remains accessible. However, some Premium features will be deactivated until you renew.
paket.faq5A: Yes, any time. You get immediate Premium access after a successful payment.

templates.heading: Invitation Templates
templates.subheading: Choose a template that fits your event. All templates support custom colors & fonts.
templates.emptySubtitle: Try changing the category or tier filter.
templates.infoDescriptionFallback: An elegant template you can customize to your needs.
templates.upgradeModalDesc: Upgrade to Premium to use this template and enjoy advanced features: live streaming, love story, digital envelope, and much more.
templates.limitPremiumDesc: You have reached the invitation limit on your Premium plan. Add more invitation slots for Rp 15,000 / invitation.
templates.limitFreeDesc: The free plan supports only 1 invitation. Upgrade to Premium to create more invitations and access all features.

eventDate.prompt: Set your event date so task deadlines are calculated automatically.
eventDate.errorPast: Event date cannot be in the past.

controls.moveDoneTooltip: Completed tasks are automatically moved to the bottom of the group, so pending tasks are easier to see.

empty.noFilterMatch: No tasks match the current filter.

stepPublikasi.publishedSubtitle: Share the link below with your guests
stepPublikasi.urlDesc: Unique address for your invitation to share
stepPublikasi.urlCustomPremiumOnly: Custom URL is only available on the Premium plan.
stepPublikasi.urlHint: Only letters, numbers, and hyphens. Example: john-and-jane-2025
stepPublikasi.urlRequired: Invitation URL is required before saving.
stepPublikasi.urlAlreadyTaken: The invitation URL is already in use. Please choose a different URL.
stepPublikasi.generalError: An error occurred. Please try again.

step1BasicInfo.title: Basic Information
step1BasicInfo.subtitle: Fill in the main details of your invitation

step2Events.title: Events & Venues
step2Events.subtitle: Add one or more event sequences

step3Gallery.title: Photo Gallery
step3Gallery.subtitle: Upload and arrange photos for the invitation gallery
step3Gallery.dropzoneHint: or click to select files (JPG, PNG, WebP · max 5 MB per photo)
step3Gallery.uploadError: Failed to upload photos. Please try again.
step3Gallery.saveFirstWarning: Save the basic information (Step 1) first before uploading photos.
step3Gallery.saveFirstHint: Save the basic information (Step 1) first to upload photos.
step3Gallery.empty: No photos yet. Upload photos above to get started.

step4Music.title: Background Music
step4Music.subtitle: Choose music to play when the invitation opens
step4Music.saveFirstHint: Save the basic information first to upload music.

step5Customization.title: Appearance Customization
step5Customization.subtitle: Adjust the colors and typography of your invitation
step5Customization.galleryScrollDesc: Swipe through photos one by one

step6Review.title: Review & Publish
step6Review.subtitle: Set URL, security, and schedule for your invitation
step6Review.publishedSubtitle: Share the link below with your guests
step6Review.draftSubtitle: You can publish it anytime from the dashboard
step6Review.urlHint: Only letters, numbers, and hyphens. Example: john-and-jane-2025
step6Review.passwordDesc: Guests must enter a password to open the invitation
step6Review.expiresHint: The invitation will automatically become inaccessible after this date

stepMedia.title: Media
stepMedia.subtitle: Photo gallery, video, and love story (all optional)
stepMedia.galleryDesc: Photo collection to display in the invitation
stepMedia.gallerySaveFirst: Save Step 1 first to upload photos.
stepMedia.videoDesc: YouTube or Vimeo video link to display
stepMedia.loveStoryDesc: Tell the journey of your love story

stepAcara.title: Events
stepAcara.subtitle: Details of event sequences and additional information
stepAcara.eventsDesc: Add one or more event sequences
stepAcara.countdownDesc: Show a countdown timer to the wedding day
stepAcara.countdownInfo: The countdown automatically uses the date of the first event you fill in. Enable the toggle to show it in the invitation.
stepAcara.streamingDesc: Live broadcast link for guests who cannot attend

stepInteraksi.title: Interaction
stepInteraksi.subtitle: RSVP, wishes, and digital gifts (all optional)
stepInteraksi.rsvpDeadlineHint: Optional. Guests can still RSVP after this date if not set.
stepInteraksi.rsvpInfo: The RSVP form will appear on the invitation page. Confirmation data goes to your dashboard.
stepInteraksi.wishesInfo: Guests can send wishes directly from the invitation page. All wishes are saved to your dashboard.

expiry.message: Your Premium plan expires in {days} days. Renew now to avoid interruption.

grace.message: ⚠️ Subscription expired. Your invitations are still active for {days} more days. After that they will be archived automatically.

invitationLimit.premiumBody: You have reached the limit of {max} invitations in your Premium plan. Delete an old invitation to create a new one.
invitationLimit.freeBody: Your current plan has reached the invitation limit. Upgrade to Premium to create more invitations.
